ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code for the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Northeast, South, Midwest, West) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* County seat or main city */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code for the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the health indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health indicator */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the health indicator */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic indicator */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the demographic indicator */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., numeric, categorical) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health or demographic indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health or demographic indicator */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the data */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chlamydia_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chlamydia rate entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "rate_per_100k" REAL /* Chlamydia rate per 100,000 population */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for the rate (e.g., 15-24, 25-34) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chlamydia_rates_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used for filtering data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES county_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for collecting the data (e.g., survey, administrative records) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source link */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "source_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was sourced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES county_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for updating the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES county_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validator who reviewed the data */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was validated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the validator */,
  "validation_score" REAL /* Validation score (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES county_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator being validated */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation rule (e.g., range check, consistency check) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_rules_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES health_indicators ("indicator_id")
)
